/// @generated
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: BinarySearchInterpolation
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {


    static constexpr std::array<float, 5> keys = {
        1.0f, 2.0f, 3.0f, 4.0f, 5.0f
    };

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const float key) noexcept {

        int32_t lo = 0;
        int32_t hi = 4;
        while (lo <= hi && key >= keys[lo] && key <= keys[hi]) {
            const float lo_key = keys[lo];
            const float hi_key = keys[hi];

            if (lo_key == hi_key) {
                if (lo_key == key)
                    return true;

                break;
            }

            const double range = static_cast<double>(hi_key) - static_cast<double>(lo_key);
            const double offset = static_cast<double>(key) - static_cast<double>(lo_key);
            int32_t mid = lo + static_cast<int32_t>((offset * (hi - lo)) / range);

            if (mid < lo)
                mid = lo;
            else if (mid > hi)
                mid = hi;

            const float mid_key = keys[mid];
            if (mid_key == key)
                return true;
            if (mid_key < key)
                lo = mid + 1;
            else
                hi = mid - 1;
        }

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 5;
    static constexpr float min_key = 1.0f;
    static constexpr float max_key = 5.0f;
};
